channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Executives including Musk and Cook invited to meet with Trump in China
item.description: Several U.S. executives from tech, finance and agriculture have been invited to accompany President Trump on a trip to China.

item.title: Rod Stewart Discusses Trump with King Charles
item.description: Rod Stewart commented on Donald Trump during a conversation with King Charles, praising his performance and referring to him as 'a ratbag'.

item.title: Pennsylvania Justice Leaves Democratic Party Amid Antisemitism Concerns
item.description: Justice David Wecht announced Monday his departure from the Democratic Party, citing concerns about antisemitism within the party.

item.title: Florida Teachers' Union Lawsuit Challenges School Choice
item.description: The Florida Education Association’s legal action raises questions about its commitment to educational opportunity.
